items.name: 古屋敷の千本桂
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 岩手県九戸郡軽米町大字晴山第26地割77番地4
items.description: 推定樹齢580年・日本最大のカツラ群木。1991年環境省「緑の国勢調査」で全国最大の巨木カツラ群として認定。樹高約25m、根元周囲約18m。

en.description_en: This is a natural monument in the plant category, a multi-trunked katsura tree. It is town-designated by Karumai Town and was designated on 1 April 1973. It is located at 77-4 Harayama 26-chiwari, Karumai Town, Kunohe District, Iwate Prefecture.
